# create-mastra

Scaffold a minimal Rust Mastra starter against the local workspace crates.

## Usage

```bash
cargo run -p create-mastra -- new ./demo-app
```

## Generated Files

- `Cargo.toml`
- `src/main.rs`
- `README.md`
- `.env.example`

## Current Boundary

This is a single built-in starter generator, not the full upstream template catalog.
